data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having source-level selection rows that can be deactivated or replaced. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or endpoints that demonstrate the ability to deactivate or replace these rows. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality, but there is no concrete evidence showing that it has been implemented or tested, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of source-level selection rows being deactivated or replaced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
